findings.evidence: The statement at lines 328-335 only mentions the bottom quotient equivalence, `orbitRelQuotientMapOfLE (⊥ ≤ H)`, and membership in `MulAction.orbit H`; its proof at lines 336-339 just applies quotient-class equality after `subgroupFiberOrbitQuotientBotEquiv`. The surrounding generic API already lives in `TauCeti.MulAction` (`OrbitRelQuotient.lean:41`, `:83`, `:102`).
findings.fix: Add the generic theorem in `TauCeti.Algebra.GroupAction.OrbitRelQuotient`, e.g. for `{G X} [Group G] [MulAction G X] (H : Subgroup G) (x y : MulAction.orbitRel.Quotient (⊥ : Subgroup G) X)`, and make this deck lemma a thin specialization.
findings.issue: `subgroupFiberOrbitMapOfLE_bot_eq_iff` is a generic orbit-quotient fact specialized to `Deck p` and a fibre.

summary: The main bottom quotient API has been moved to the generic `TauCeti.MulAction` level, but one new bottom-map equality criterion remains unnecessarily deck-fibre-specific.
